ai_summary: **Executive Summary: Eastern Silk Industries Limited Auditor Change**  Eastern Silk Industries Limited has appointed Vyas and Vyas, Chartered Accountants, as its new Statutory Auditors effective July 7, 2026, filling a casual vacancy. This appointment was necessitated by the resignation of the previous auditors, M/s B K Shroff & Co. A potential red flag is the absence of any disclosed reason for the predecessor auditor's resignation, which often warrants further scrutiny into the company's financial reporting or internal controls.
